channel.title: reflection on evocations
channel.description: Recent content in reflection on evocations

item.description: Dear Reader, So the year’s comin’ to an end. Thought I’d look back and check in on what all I’ve been up to this year. It’s a long time, a year. That’s 365 days. But they add up. For the first part of the year, I rid myself of the concept of “dates”, and set all my calendars to just display the day of the year it was. For instance, today is day 361.
